FIX.TITLE: Fix
FIX.EPUB_READY_WITH_COVER: The file was read successfully and its current cover is ready to preview.
FIX.EPUB_READY_NO_COVER: The file was read successfully. A preview cover is not available for this EPUB on this device.
FIX.COVER_PREVIEW_BODY: This is the cover currently detected inside the EPUB.
FIX.NO_COVER_BODY: The EPUB is loaded, but the app could not extract a cover preview. You can still continue with the repair workflow when it is connected.
FIX.INTRO_BODY: This screen now uses the same EPUB intake pattern as ECC: header tools, file validation, working copy creation, and cover extraction when available.
FIX.NEXT_STEP_1: Connect the actual repair actions on top of the prepared working EPUB.
FIX.NEXT_STEP_2: Keep reusable EPUB behavior in shared kits and leave only app-specific repair logic here.
FIX.NEXT_STEP_3: Use My EPUBs for recent files, repaired outputs, or repair history.
FIX.INFO_STEP_1: Select an EPUB from your device.
FIX.INFO_STEP_2: The app validates the file and creates a working copy.
FIX.INFO_STEP_3: If the EPUB exposes a readable cover, the app extracts it for preview.
FIX.INFO_STEP_4: Once the repair flow is connected, this prepared EPUB can move into the next fixing steps.
FIX.EPUB_ERROR_CORRUPT: The EPUB could not be read. Try another file.
FIX.EPUB_ERROR_NO_COVER: This EPUB does not contain a replaceable cover.
FIX.EPUB_ERROR_REWRITE: The EPUB could not be processed. Please try again.
FIX.EPUB_ERROR_STORAGE: Not enough storage space. Need {{requiredMB}} MB, available {{availableMB}} MB.
FIX.EPUB_ERROR_SIZE: The file is too large. Maximum {{maxSize}} MB.

MY_EPUBS.TITLE: My EPUBs
MY_EPUBS.EMPTY_BODY: Your repaired or imported files will appear here once the fixer workflow is connected.

INSTRUCTIONS.TITLE: Instructions
INSTRUCTIONS.INTRO_TITLE: How this shell is meant to work
INSTRUCTIONS.INTRO_BODY: EPUB Fixer is ready for the same app-level experience as ECC, without the image editor.
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_1: Select and validate EPUBs in the Fix tab.
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_2: Reuse file-kit for local files and settings-kit for persisted preferences.
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_3: Keep language, themes, and shared UI in sync through the shared kits.
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_4: When the repair workflow is ready, surface outputs or history in My EPUBs.
INSTRUCTIONS.NOTE_BODY: This screen is intentionally lightweight so we can plug in the real repair logic without reworking the shell later.

SETTINGS.TITLE: Settings
SETTINGS.INSTRUCTIONS_HINT: How EPUB Fixer is organized right now
